name: AletaIndex Narrative Intelligence
description: Financial narrative intelligence for AI agents. Tracks how financial stories evolve across thousands of news sources — clustering articles into structured narratives, measuring sentiment momentum, and mapping narrative risk across portfolios. Available for 109 tickers across all major sectors.

tools.name: get_narratives
tools.description: Get financial narrative intelligence for one or more stocks. Returns structured narrative data: persistent story threads, daily article clusters, and sentiment scores.

tickers.description: Comma-separated ticker symbols (e.g. 'NVDA' or 'NVDA,TSLA,AAPL'). Max 10 per request.

from_date.description: Start date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to 7 days ago.

to_date.description: End date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to today.

tools.name: get_portfolio_risk
tools.description: Analyze narrative risk across a portfolio of stocks. Groups narratives by macro theme and identifies concentrated narrative exposure across multiple positions.

holdings.description: Portfolio as TICKER:WEIGHT pairs, comma-separated (e.g. 'NVDA:0.30,AAPL:0.25,TSLA:0.20,MSFT:0.25'). Max 50 holdings.

env.name: NARRATIVE_API_KEY
env.description: API key from aletaindex-narrative.com. Free trial available — 10 tickers, 90 days history, 500 credits.
